nl_query: Which boards have a board coordinator who is also listed as a primary evaluator in the pool, and what is the total number of scripts that coordinator has evaluated versus coordinated?
failed_sql: SELECT b.id AS board_id, COUNT(s.id) AS total_scripts_evaluated, COUNT(h.id) AS total_scripts_coordinated FROM board b JOIN board_coordinator bc ON b.id = bc.board_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON bc.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN script_assignment sa ON fc.id = sa.faculty_cache_id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON sa.id = ea.assignment_id JOIN honorarium_summary h ON ea.faculty_cache_id = h.faculty_cache_id WHERE fc.name = bc.name AND h.role_in_board = 'PRIMARY' GROUP BY b.id
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: board_coordinator does NOT have name. Join to faculty_cache: faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = bc.faculty_cache_id, then use fc.name.
